title: Piel canela
writer: Julio Alejandro, Juan José Ortega, Mane Sierra
actors: Sara Montiel, Manolo Fábregas, Ramón Gay
plot: In Havana, gangster moll and singer Marucha, who has a disfigured face since childhood, is helped by a plastic surgeon who falls madly in love with her. The good doctor hopes to reform her and turn her into a good woman by transfo...
